distinctive_features: depiction of religious figures such as Christ, the Virgin Mary, or saints
stylized, elongated figures with solemn expressions
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: typically small to medium, ranging from 30 cm to 1 meter in height

domain_specific_visual.iconography: adherence to traditional canons of representation
domain_specific_visual.halo: golden halo around the head of the depicted figure

domain_specific_functional.spiritual_presence: believed to manifest the presence of the depicted figure
domain_specific_functional.ritual_use: used in Orthodox Christian rituals and ceremonies

relationships.description: Byzantine icons were influenced by the artistic traditions of the Eastern Roman Empire.
Icons are used in the liturgical practices of the Orthodox Church.

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: represents the divine and serves as a medium for spiritual connection
